reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the goal animation and attach a GoalTrigger collider child entity.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_exit_gate_6f_32x32.png through AssetServer and build a six-column TextureAtlasLayout.
runtime_notes: The gate stays hidden until the final chamber camera chunk is active.
Animation loops even while the player is invulnerable so the clear target never feels ambiguous.
Goal trigger bounds use the 32x32 logical size from specs.dimensions_px.

context.usage: Animated gate at the final chamber that confirms the hidden end point without exposing distance during the run.

shape.silhouette: Squared dungeon gate with gold seams, barred center opening, and a soft pulse that grows toward the center frame.

specs.lighting: Warm gold pulse against cold stone makes the final chamber distinct without revealing progress earlier.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x32 px with six 32x32 frames.
Pulse brightness peaks in frame 4 while the barred silhouette remains readable.
Gate frame keeps a 1 px outline on all outer edges.
